body.docName: 同步下载单据发票文件
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/bill/download-invoice 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/bill/download-invoice 
 ## 接口描述 
根据单据编号同步下载发票的全量文件（如果同一张发票有 pdf、ofd、xml、png的格式的文件则会下载4个文件），返回zip包；
如果单据关联发票文件过多(>50)则会返回指定的错误码(D0009),此时需分批下载-通过请求体中的 invoiceNumbers和invoiceCodes指定发票分批下载文件；
invoiceNumbers和invoiceCodes可以通过调用对应单据详情接口获取。
如《对公报账单》：开发文档 ->智能费控服务 -> 对公报账业务 -> 批量查询对公报账单详情；
《差旅报销单》：开发文档 ->智能费控服务 -> 报销单业务 -> 单笔查询差旅报销单详情；
ps：发票有invoiceNumber时传invoiceNumber ；如果没有invoiceNumber 时则传invoiceCode进行查询下载，invoiceNumbers 和 invoiceCodes 都传时，取两个条件的并集 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":true,"exampleValue":"2025032004147206","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"invoiceNumbers","maxLength":"10","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%2010%E4%B8%AA","exampleValue":"%5B25519146042000000001%2C25519146042000000002%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%20%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A10%E4%B8%AA%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%0A"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"invoiceCodes","maxLength":"10","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A10%E4%B8%AA","exampleValue":"%5B234487841%2C234487842%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A10%E4%B8%AA"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
	"billId":2025032504154457,
	"invoiceNumbers":["23448784110000001669","23448784110000001618"],
	"invoiceCodes":["243291305480","243291305123"]
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
文件流（文件为.zip 的文件压缩包）
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | D0003| 单据费用凭证不存在| 检查单据编号是否正确或是否关联费用凭证 |
  | D0009| 影像文件数量过大（>50）| 指定具体发票下载 |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/bill/download-invoice

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/bill/download-invoice

接口描述

根据单据编号同步下载发票的全量文件（如果同一张发票有 pdf、ofd、xml、png的格式的文件则会下载4个文件），返回zip包； 如果单据关联发票文件过多(>50)则会返回指定的错误码(D0009),此时需分批下载-通过请求体中的 invoiceNumbers和invoiceCodes指定发票分批下载文件； invoiceNumbers和invoiceCodes可以通过调用对应单据详情接口获取。 如《对公报账单》：开发文档 ->智能费控服务 -> 对公报账业务 -> 批量查询对公报账单详情； 《差旅报销单》：开发文档 ->智能费控服务 -> 报销单业务 -> 单笔查询差旅报销单详情； ps：发票有invoiceNumber时传invoiceNumber ；如果没有invoiceNumber 时则传invoiceCode进行查询下载，invoiceNumbers 和 invoiceCodes 都传时，取两个条件的并集

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":true,"exampleValue":"2025032004147206","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"invoiceNumbers","maxLength":"10","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%2010%E4%B8%AA","exampleValue":"%5B25519146042000000001%2C25519146042000000002%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%20%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A10%E4%B8%AA%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%0A"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"invoiceCodes","maxLength":"10","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A10%E4%B8%AA","exampleValue":"%5B234487841%2C234487842%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A10%E4%B8%AA"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
	"billId":2025032504154457,
	"invoiceNumbers":["23448784110000001669","23448784110000001618"],
	"invoiceCodes":["243291305480","243291305123"]
}

响应报文

文件流（文件为.zip 的文件压缩包）

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
D0003 单据费用凭证不存在 检查单据编号是否正确或是否关联费用凭证
D0009 影像文件数量过大（>50） 指定具体发票下载
